case_title: REGENCY COMMONS I VS. ALICIA LEDESMA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,681.51 FILED BY REGENCY COMMONS I AS TO DEFENDANT LEDESMA, ALICIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-10-2013 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF REGENCY COMMONS I

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF REGENCY COMMONS I RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEDESMA, ALICIA $5,681.51 PRINCIPAL, $170.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,851.51 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY DEFENDANT LEDESMA, ALICIA

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY ALICIA LEDESMA IS GRANTED. CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO APR-16-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN 506 FOR TRIAL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JONATHAN SOFFER--MANAGING MEMBER. DEFENDANT DID NOT WAIVES SERVICE IN COURT TODAY.NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT LEDESMA, ALICIA HEARING SET FOR MAR-06-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
